generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensor providing runtime occupancy data for real-time synchronization with the Digital Twin, referenced in TwinLight and BOREALIS projects."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensor capturing environmental parameters (e.g., temperature, CO2, luminosity) for building infrastructure monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specific sensor type measuring indoor temperature for real-time environmental monitoring and control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring CO2 levels to support indoor air quality monitoring and occupant health optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance LuminositySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring light intensity for daylight harvesting and visual comfort optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminosityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalConditionSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance LuminosityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminositySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM model with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) and middleware settings (Hono/Ditto endpoints)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RuntimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time streams from IoT sensors (e.g., temperature, occupancy, CO2) for immediate synchronization with the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, CO2DataTransmitted, LuminosityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance HistoricalSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated historical sensor data for trend analysis and long-term optimization of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded control logic (reinforcement learning policies from BOREALIS or rule-based logic from TwinLight) for automated building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance UnrealEngine5VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization model for immersive monitoring of building systems via Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates extraction of domain semantics from BIM models and generates runtime artifacts (middleware configurations, control logic) via model-to-model/text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, ModelValidationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight messaging protocol for real-time IoT data exchange between physical assets and the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin framework for device management, bidirectional communication, and standardized data models."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService, DataSynchronizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides rich, interactive 3D visualization for facility managers and stakeholders."
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables adaptive control policies for energy optimization and visual comfort using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS)."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of sensor data (e.g., energy consumption, indoor environmental conditions) in real-time via Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeEnvironmentalInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, OccupantComfortInsight
]

instance AutomatedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated control strategies (e.g., daylight harvesting, occupancy-based lighting) generated from BIM-enriched models."
    DTDFVocab:provides DaylightHarvestingAction, OccupancyBasedLightingAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performance analysis of building systems under varying conditions (e.g., climate change scenarios)."
    DTDFVocab:provides ClimateScenarioInsight
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for DT engineers to develop plugins (e.g., additional analytics, IoT integrations)."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsInsight
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Seamless synchronization between virtual and physical assets via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for live adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalVirtualSynchronizationAction
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

    DTDFVocab:provides DataNormalizationAction
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides ModelConsistencyInsight
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization for facility managers to analyze and adjust building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DInsight
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Scans BIM models for 'twinnable' devices, extracts metadata, and generates runtime configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentConfigurationAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Closed-loop control using sensor feedback for adaptive optimization of building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlPolicyInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeEnvironmentalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualization of indoor environmental conditions (temperature, CO2, occupancy) for immediate operational awareness."
]

]

]

]

    base:desc "Automated adjustment of artificial lighting based on natural daylight availability."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalVirtualSynchronizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Configuration and management of IoT devices within the Digital Twin ecosystem."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Normalization of sensor data to ensure compatibility across different data sources."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    base:desc "Generation of runtime configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto based on BIM model scanning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world involve **control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the physical asset via the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). These signals include **actuation commands** (e.g., dimming lights, adjusting HVAC setpoints) derived from **optimization algorithms** (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) or **user-defined control logic** (e.g., occupancy-based lighting in TwinLight). The DT framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing dynamic adjustments without full redeployment. The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer provides an interactive interface for facility managers to manually override or fine-tune control parameters."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and virtual twins, as enabled by **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **live data exchange**. The framework supports **continuous bidirectional communication**, ensuring that the DT reflects the current state of the physical asset. However, the documents do not specify **sub-second latency**, **minutes/hours for periodic synchronization**, or other granular time scales. The focus is on **real-time** and **runtime** operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **Core DT Framework**: Central hub for bidirectional data exchange, model management, and service integration.
  - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for **real-time connectivity** and **device abstraction**.
  - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for **immersive monitoring** and **user interaction**.
  - **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for **custom services** (e.g., analytics, IoT integrations) developed by DT engineers.
  - **BIM Integration Layer**: Extracts and validates device metadata from BIM models to generate deployable artifacts.
  The constellation supports **modular scalability**, allowing the DT to evolve with new services or building modifications. The **Living Lab case study** demonstrates a **proof-of-concept deployment** of this constellation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle phases of the physical asset:
  1. **Design Phase**: Leverages BIM models to define static geometries, spatial relationships, and initial device configurations.
  2. **Construction Phase**: Supports clash detection and automated commissioning of Building Control Systems (BCS).
  3. **Operation Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning).
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation Phase**: Facilitates **dynamic reconfiguration** of the DT to accommodate changes (e.g., retrofitting, tenant modifications) without full redeployment.
  The DT represents the physical asset **as operated**, with continuous synchronization to reflect real-world conditions (e.g., sensor drift, wear-and-tear)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model-Driven Validation**: Automated checks for **semantic consistency** and **metadata completeness** in BIM models.
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto enforce **low-latency data exchange** to minimize drift between physical and virtual assets.
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantifies the **degree of alignment** between the DT and its physical counterpart, accounting for **uncertainty** (e.g., sensor noise, model approximations).
  - **Reinforcement Learning (BOREALIS)**: Iteratively refines control policies using **post-occupancy sensor data**, reducing performance gaps between design and operation.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework acknowledges **sensor inaccuracies** and **model simplifications** but mitigates their impact via **dynamic recalibration** and **user feedback loops**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and Digital Twin (DT) is established using **Eclipse Hono** and **Eclipse Ditto** as middleware platforms for **real-time data exchange**. These tools provide:
  - **Bidirectional communication channels** between sensors/actuators in the PT and the DT.
  - **Lightweight messaging protocols** (implied by Hono/Ditto’s design) to support high-frequency data transmission.
  - **Standardized interfaces** for integrating heterogeneous data sources (e.g., BIM models, IoT devices) into the DT ecosystem.
  The document does not specify **exact network protocols** (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) or detailed architecture diagrams, but the use of **Hono/Ditto** implies adherence to **open standards** for interoperability. The framework ensures that the connection is **scalable and modular**, allowing for the integration of additional devices or services without disrupting existing workflows."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, to ensure compatibility with existing systems and workflows. The model-driven approach leverages BIM as the **semantic backbone** for integrating static and dynamic building data, enabling seamless interoperability across disciplines (e.g., architects, engineers, facility managers). The framework also supports **standardized extension points** for modular service integration, aligning with broader **model-driven engineering (MDE)** principles. While the document does not explicitly mention **specific standardization bodies or protocols** (e.g., ISO, OMG), the emphasis on BIM and MDE implies adherence to **industry-recognized standards** for digital twins in the construction sector."
]
